title: 1.1: Fixes LE variant detection in all 3 guess_payload_class methods (IRemoteSCMActivator_RemoteCreateInstance, OpcDaAuth3, OpcDaHeaderN) in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py
1.2: Fixes both LE variant class entries (OpcDaFackLE and OpcDaBind_nakLE) in the PDU type dispatch dictionary in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py
1.3: Fixes all 4 field name typos (fragLenght to fragLength, authLenght to authLength, pda2 to pad2, portSPec to portSpec) in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py
1.4: Renames RequestSubData class to RequestStubData in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py
1.5: Renames subData field to stubData in all 4 packet classes (OpcDaRequest, OpcDaResponse, OpcDaFault, OpcDaReject) in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py
1.6: Refactors LenStringPacket in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py to use MultipleTypeField for the data field
1.7: Fixes ResultElement endianness in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py by using ShortEnumField for the reason field
1.8: Renames AttributeName class to AV_PAIR in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py with MS-NLMP field names (avID, avLen, value)
1.9: Adds both required fields (resultList and authentication) to OpcDaAlter_Context_Resp in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py
1.10: Makes OpcDaRequest UUID field conditional in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py based on objectUuid flag
1.11: Adds authentication field to OpcDaFault in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py
1.12: Rebuilds the cached struct object after changing the format string in _make_le in scapy/contrib/opc_da.py
4.1: Modifies OpcDaHeaderN fields_desc beyond correcting field name typos (such as adding, removing, or reordering fields)
4.2: Removes a packet class referenced in _opcDa_pdu_classes (such as OpcDaFack, OpcDaBind_nak, or their LE variants)
